mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from dbo.v_shikomi_total
order by ${orderByClause}

distinct
from dbo.v_shikomi_total
order by ${orderByClause}

update dbo.v_shikomi_total
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ShikomiNo = #{record.shikomino,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SupplierCode = #{record.suppliercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LastQty = #{record.lastqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ApplyQty = #{record.applyqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
RemainQty = #{record.remainqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
MaxQty = #{record.maxqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
QtyOrdPre = #{record.qtyordpre,jdbcType=INTEGER},
serialModel = #{record.serialmodel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AnswerText = #{record.answertext,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
RegistDate = #{record.registdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ReviseDate = #{record.revisedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ClassType = #{record.classtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
ClassCode = #{record.classcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
SubsidiaryCode = #{record.subsidiarycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CompanyCode = #{record.companycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BranchCode = #{record.branchcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvDate = #{record.dlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ApplyTime = #{record.applytime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OrderQty = #{record.orderqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CancelQty = #{record.cancelqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
UpdateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CreateTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CreateUser = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdateUser = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ApplyPsnName = #{record.applypsnname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EPrice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
QtyWarning = #{record.qtywarning,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ApplicantNo = #{record.applicantno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ApplicantName = #{record.applicantname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ApplicantEmail = #{record.applicantemail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ApproverNo = #{record.approverno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ApproverName = #{record.approvername,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ApproverEmail = #{record.approveremail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AsseDays = #{record.assedays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
QtyNoord = #{record.qtynoord,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Price_lot = #{record.priceLot,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
IndCode = #{record.indcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
partPrepareDays = #{record.partpreparedays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
applyNo = #{record.applyno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Rohs = #{record.rohs,jdbcType=CHAR},
qtyPO = #{record.qtypo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qtyOnhand = #{record.qtyonhand,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inspectStatus = #{record.inspectstatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
inspectSendTime = #{record.inspectsendtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
InspectAnswerTime = #{record.inspectanswertime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
InspectAnswerPsnName = #{record.inspectanswerpsnname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
InspectAnswerPsnNo = #{record.inspectanswerpsnno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspectDaily = #{record.inspectdaily,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
inspectType = #{record.inspecttype,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
InspectAnswerText = #{record.inspectanswertext,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
PlanUseDate = #{record.planusedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
pplNo = #{record.pplno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
projectNo = #{record.projectno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
avgOrdQty = #{record.avgordqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
LastOrdDate = #{record.lastorddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
inspectApplyType = #{record.inspectapplytype,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
InspectApproverNo = #{record.inspectapproverno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InspectApproverName = #{record.inspectapprovername,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
InspectApproverTime = #{record.inspectapprovertime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelCount = #{record.modelcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelType = #{record.modeltype,jdbcType=CHAR},

MainModelNo = #{record.mainmodelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspectQty = #{record.inspectqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
isWarning = #{record.iswarning,jdbcType=CHAR},
warehouseCode = #{record.warehousecode,jdbcType=VARBINARY},
